DB.description: Cloudflare D1 database used by the vps-sentinel panel. Cloudflare can create this automatically during Deploy to Cloudflare.

PANEL_SHARED_SECRET.description: HMAC ingest secret shared with every vps-sentinel agent. Generate a random value, for example `openssl rand -hex 32`.

PANEL_TOKEN.description: Private browser token for the management pages and review APIs. Generate a random value, for example `openssl rand -hex 32`.

PANEL_ADMIN_PATH.description: Hidden management entry path. Keep the leading slash. You can change `/panel-admin` to a random path like `/a13f90c2d4b8`.
